query: SELECT li.description, li.quantity, li.unitPrice, li.amount FROM invoiceLineItems li WHERE li.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND UPPER(li.description) IN ('FARINE THREE STARS NON BLANCHIE AA40 - 20 KG', 'MILK 3.25% LACTANTIA', 'SUCRE FIN - REDPATH - 20 KG', 'CREAM 10% LACTANTIA (16)', 'GRAINE DE SÉSAME INDIEN 99.98% PUR - 50 LBS - 22.68 KG') LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT li.description, li.quantity, li.unitPrice, li.amount FROM invoiceLineItems li WHERE li.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND UPPER(li.description) IN ('FARINE THREE STARS NON BLANCHIE AA40 - 20 KG', 'MILK 3.25% LACTANTIA', 'SUCRE FIN - REDPATH - 20 KG', 'CREAM 10% LACTANTIA (16)', 'GRAINE DE SÉSAME INDIEN 99.98% PUR - 50 LBS - 22.68 KG') LIMIT 10;
